name: codex-chrome-bridge
description: Local Chrome extension, CLI, and MCP server for read-mostly control of a real Chrome profile from Codex-style agents.

scripts.check: node --check ./server/bridge-server.mjs && node --check ./bin/chrome-bridge.mjs && node --check ./mcp/chrome-bridge-mcp.mjs && node --check ./extension/background.js && node --check ./extension/extension-errors.js && node --check ./extension/offscreen-lifecycle.js && node --check ./extension/page-scripts.js && node --check ./extension/safety-gates.js && node --check ./extension/tab-cleanup.js && node --check ./extension/workspace-policy.js && node --check ./extension/offscreen.js && node --check ./extension/ask.js && node --check ./scripts/install-launch-agent.mjs && node --check ./scripts/uninstall-launch-agent.mjs && node --check ./scripts/generate-command-catalog.mjs && node --check ./scripts/check-command-registry.mjs && node --check ./scripts/check-bridge-contract.mjs && node --check ./scripts/check-docs-coverage.mjs && node --check ./scripts/check-package-contents.mjs && node --check ./scripts/check-privacy-scan.mjs && npm run self-test && npm run check:registry && npm run check:bridge-contract && npm run check:docs && npm run check:privacy
